name: What proof do I need for my work injury claim—no one saw it?

mainEntity.name: What proof do I need for my work injury claim—no one saw it?

acceptedAnswer.text: Medical records, report, photos—causation from docs beats no witnesses.
acceptedAnswer.description: Medical records linking injury to work, your incident report, supervisor statements, photos, and treatment notes suffice even without witnesses. Key factors: Prompt reporting creates paper trail; doctor opinions on causation key; surveillance video if available. Submit to insurer promptly; if denied, appeal with evidence. Build case early with attorney help.

description: Medical records, report, photos—causation from docs beats no witnesses.
